judge_reason: Description A states a 'partial slogan cancellation stamp' while Description B provides a specific 'rectangular stamp' with text 'CIVIL D / JOIN'—these are contradictory descriptions of the same stamp element.
original_image_tags: A scanned image of the front of a used, brownish paper envelope. It features a handwritten return address and addressee, a circular postmark, and a partial slogan cancellation stamp.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A beige manila envelope with handwritten blue ink address text, a circular postmark stamp, partial printed words at upper right, and a white label reading “THE CITY MAYOR / TUCSON, / ARIZONA / U.S.A.”*
